info.title: Streamient API
info.description: Everything your AI needs to remember — Notes, Memory, URLs, AI Chat

email_filter.description: Incoming email trash filter rules. Supports sender address/domain/local-part rules and subject rules like `subject: failed login` or `subject contains: status update`.

TenantLimits.description: Tenant-wide hosted limits. Zero means unlimited.

thread_key.description: Typesense list grouping key derived from the root connected message identifier.

thread_identifiers.description: Canonical message identifiers for the connected email thread when included by realtime/update responses.

thread_source_ids.description: Email document IDs in the connected thread when included by realtime/update responses.

html_content.description: Sanitized HTML email body. Remote image URLs are stored on data-st-remote-src until explicitly loaded by a client.

excerpt.description: Compact list excerpt. Typesense-backed list rows return this without Mongo hydration.

display_date.description: Message display date using createdAt before updatedAt fallback.

thread_latest.description: Newest non-trash email in this connected thread when included by list responses for display sender/date/excerpt.

masked.description: Masked placeholder when a custom key is configured

openai_api_key.description: New OpenAI API key. Use null or empty string to clear.

gemini_api_key.description: New Gemini API key. Use null or empty string to clear.

sync_mode.description: read_only imports only; read_write also exports back to git

AiDailyLimit.description: The hosted tenant reached its stored daily AI workflow limit. Zero means unlimited.

limit.description: AI workflows allowed per day for this tenant

get.description: Returns one row per tenant, not one row per user. Requires a backend-admin session.

post.description: Atomically creates the tenant, verified owner, owner membership, and default project. Zero limits mean unlimited. Post-commit Stripe, Typesense, or magic-link failures return warnings without rolling back the account.

magic_link_sent.description: True only when the magic-link email was submitted to configured SMTP.

get.summary: Get a tenant account and team members

put.description: Updates tenant identity, owner identity, status, plan, and tenant-wide limits. Lowering limits never deletes existing data. Plan changes never rewrite limits.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the exact tenant and its host-scoped Streamient data.

post.description: Root-level public forwarding endpoint, not under /api/v1. The recipient must be PROJECT_ID@EMAIL_FORWARD_DOMAIN and may be supplied through envelope/provider fields such as recipient, recipients, session.recipient, envelope.to, Delivered-To, X-Original-To, Envelope-To, OriginalRecipient, SES receipt.recipients, or Received for. Plain text is imported when present; HTML-only email is stripped to text. Attachments are ignored. Matching the project email filter stores the email in trash.

bcc.description: Parsed BCC fallback. Envelope/provider recipient fields are preferred for hidden delivery detection.

email_filter.description: Incoming email trash filter rules. Supports sender address/domain/local-part rules and subject rules like `subject: failed login` or `subject contains: status update`.

400.description: Cannot delete — project still has notes, memories, URLs, or git repos

get.description: Returns project details, feature availability, forwarding domain, and masked git repo settings. Requires owner/admin access.

post.description: Applies saved project email filter rules to project inbox and labeled emails. Candidate selection uses Typesense; MongoDB updates are limited to matched email IDs.

403.description: Owner/admin or email feature access required

post.description: Adds a user to the current account with the member role. Existing Streamient users are linked to the current account; new users are created with email/password login access.

name.description: Required only when creating a brand-new user.

password.description: Required only when creating a brand-new user.

403.description: Team admin access required or stored account user limit reached

get.summary: Get OAuth + MCP discovery configuration for the active account
List authorized OAuth apps for the active user + account
List pre-registered OAuth clients for the active account

post.summary: Create a pre-registered OAuth client for the active account

jwks.description: Public JSON Web Key Set for private_key_jwt clients

jwks_uri.description: HTTPS URL for a public JSON Web Key Set for private_key_jwt clients

client_secret.description: Returned only once when token_endpoint_auth_method is client_secret_post

get.description: Typesense-backed mailbox results grouped by thread_key and ordered by email created date descending. Mongo is used for detail, thread, and write paths only.

parsed_email.description: Mailparser-like JSON payload. HTML may be supplied as html, html_content, or body_html and is sanitized before storage.

html_content.description: Optional HTML body for flat parsed payloads. Sanitized before storage.

get.summary: List email IDs for current view
get.description: Email ID list grouped by thread using the same mailbox, label, project filters, and created-date ordering as /emails.

put.description: Updates stored email metadata and content. Use DELETE to move an email to trash.

html_content.description: Sanitized before storage. Send an empty string to clear stored HTML.

delete.description: Moves the email to trash and clears all labels.

screenshot_data_url.description: Optional browser-captured screenshot data URL for authenticated or paywalled pages.

put.description: Set crawl_enabled to false to stop URL path crawling and remove crawled page documents for this URL from the pages index.

deleted_pages.description: Number of crawled page documents removed when crawling was disabled.

post.description: Deletes existing crawled page documents for this URL, then starts URL path crawling in the background.

deleted_pages.description: Number of crawled page documents removed before resync.

get.description: Serves a screenshot image. Requires valid HMAC signature and unexpired timestamp. No authentication needed.

get.summary: Get total item count for select-all
get.description: Returns the total number of items of a given type, optionally filtered by project. Uses Typesense for performance.

post.description: For emails, moves each email to trash and clears all labels.

all.description: When true, delete all items of the given type (ids is ignored)

filterProject.description: Filter by project ID when all=true

post.summary: Batch move items to a project

all.description: When true, move all items of the given type (ids is ignored)

filterProject.description: Filter by source project ID when all=true

post.summary: Batch copy items to a project

all.description: When true, copy all items of the given type (ids is ignored)

filterProject.description: Filter by source project ID when all=true

post.summary: Search knowledge (notes + memories + URLs + emails + pages)
Fast lexical search for the top search palette
post.description: Searches notes, memories, URLs, pages, and emails when email access is enabled. Returns normalized records with safe highlight segments and client open targets.

per_page.description: Results per collection before final merge

get.description: Returns the current account search reindex state. Use as a polling fallback when socket progress events are missed.
Returns masked/configured status for hosted Pro account BYO AI API keys. Raw API keys are never returned.

403.description: Hosted Pro account admin access required

put.description: Stores or clears hosted Pro account BYO AI API keys. Omitted fields are left unchanged; null or empty string clears a key.

403.description: Hosted Pro account admin access required

get.description: Returns account white-label branding and custom domain status. Requires owner/admin access.

put.description: Updates Pro custom domain configuration. Asset uploads use the asset endpoints.

dns_name_custom.description: Custom login/app domain. Empty string clears it.

403.description: Account admin or Pro access required

post.description: Checks the CNAME target and provisions or refreshes the Cloudflare Custom Hostname. Requires owner/admin and Pro access.

403.description: Account admin or Pro access required

post.description: Refreshes Cloudflare Custom Hostname and SSL status. Requires owner/admin and Pro access.

403.description: Account admin or Pro access required

post.description: Uploads and normalizes a white-label image to PNG. `logo` and `favicon` are available on Free. `login_logo` requires Pro.

403.description: Account admin or Pro access required

delete.description: Removes a white-label asset. `login_logo` requires Pro.

403.description: Account admin or Pro access required

post.description: Classifies the query intent (search, action, analysis, conversation), routes to the appropriate handler, and returns results + conversational answer. Results are displayed in the main panel.

conversation_reset.description: True when the requested conversation was invalid/expired and a new thread was started automatically

previous_conversation_id.description: The stale conversation ID that was replaced, when conversation_reset is true

post.summary: AI-powered chat with streaming SSE response
post.description: Same intent classification as POST /chat, but streams the answer as Server-Sent Events. For stats and analysis intents, LLM tokens are streamed incrementally. For search/conversation/action intents, the answer is sent as a single token event. A final "done" event contains metadata (conversation_id, results, action, display_in).

200.description: SSE stream with events: token ({"text":"..."}), done ({"conversation_id":"...", "results":[], "action":null, "display_in":"panel|chat"}), error ({"error":"..."})

get.description: Typesense-backed mixed trash listing for notes, memories, URLs, and emails. Items are sorted by trashed_at descending and writes still use Mongo.
Typesense-backed count across notes, memories, URLs, and emails.

post.summary: Create a link between two items

get.summary: Get all links for an item
Get the knowledge graph data (nodes and edges)

get.description: Returns 200 if the process is up. No auth required. Mounted at /health (not under /api/v1).
Returns 200 if MongoDB connection is ready, 503 otherwise. No auth required.
Returns 200 if Redis is reachable, 503 otherwise. No auth required.
Returns 200 if Typesense is healthy, 503 otherwise. No auth required.
Returns 200 if Socket.IO is initialized, 503 otherwise. No auth required.
Returns paginated audit logs for the current tenant. Supports filtering by resource, action, channel, date range, and free-text search.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text search across resource_id, token_label, mcp_client

post.description: Starts an account export for the current tenant. Available to account owners and admins only.

get.description: Returns the current export job status for the active account. Available to account owners and admins only.
Downloads the generated ZIP export for the active account. Available to account owners and admins only.

get.summary: List git repos for a project
get.description: Returns all configured git repos for the given project. Requires Pro plan or self-hosted (free) edition.

post.summary: Add a git repo to a project

sync_mode.description: read_only (default) imports only; read_write also exports notes/memories back to git

commit_history_days.description: Days of commit history to backfill on first sync

sync_mode.description: read_only imports only; read_write also exports back to git

post.description: Immediately syncs the git repo (pull + push). Returns when complete unless background is true.

background.description: Start sync in the background and return immediately

get.description: Returns git sync log entries retained for the last 14 days.
